meaning: n.访问,探望,正式的视察n.[宗]天罚,天降的祸福
examples: She is seeking more liberal visitation with her daughter.
He was not given any visitation rights by the divorce court.
House-to-house visitation has been carried on, under the regulations of the General Board of Health.
There, the judge had awarded custody to Yvette Mulvey and visitation privileges to Duane Mulvey.
The court also noted that the Troxels were not seeking visitation because Granville was an unfit mother.
